risks.root_cause: Role assignment endpoint is implemented as an unauthenticated webhook-style route without Clerk signature verification; onboarding writes to it directly.
risks.recommended_fix: Split onboarding role update into authenticated internal API route; keep actual Clerk webhook separately with svix signature validation and strict event handling.
risks.launch_impact: Account/role tampering risk and non-compliant auth model.

risks.root_cause: Blob uploads are stored with public access despite private/signed URL requirements.
risks.recommended_fix: Switch to private Blob access mode, implement signed URL issuance and expiry checks, and enforce ownership on retrieval/download.
risks.launch_impact: Potential data leakage of claimant documents and reports.

risks.root_cause: Require-auth present but ownership checks are missing for document/comparable operations.
risks.recommended_fix: Introduce and enforce resource-level ownership validation in every mutating/read endpoint tied to appraisal/doc IDs.

risks.root_cause: UI sends extraction payload with documentId while API expects documentUrl/documentType.
risks.recommended_fix: Unify extraction contract; persist document metadata and invoke extraction by URL/type reliably with schema validation.
risks.launch_impact: AI extraction workflow fails in core appraisal journey.

risks.root_cause: Client navigation pushes `/appraisals/*` paths that do not match Next app route namespace (`/dashboard/appraisals/*`).
risks.recommended_fix: Normalize all internal links/router.push targets to the dashboard route group and add route constants.
risks.launch_impact: Wizard/report flows break for end users.

risks.root_cause: PDF generator does not implement required 14+ section report format.
risks.recommended_fix: Build full sectioned React-PDF pipeline with cover letter, comps tables, valuation analysis, narratives, legal citations, appendices, and pagination.
risks.launch_impact: Primary monetized deliverable is not launch-ready.

risks.root_cause: No migration artifacts detected; schema/index rollout state is not reproducible.
risks.recommended_fix: Generate and commit baseline migrations, add migration CI checks, and document migration runbook.
risks.launch_impact: Production DB drift and unsafe deploy risk.

risks.root_cause: Checkout expects STRIPE_*_PRICE_ID vars that are absent/mismatched in env templates/context.
risks.recommended_fix: Standardize env key names across code, templates, and deployment docs; add startup validation for all required price IDs.
risks.launch_impact: Revenue path can fail at runtime.

risks.root_cause: No automated test suite found for critical workflows and security boundaries.
risks.recommended_fix: Add unit + integration + E2E baseline suite for auth ownership, calculations, uploads, extraction, report generation, and payments.
risks.launch_impact: High regression risk and no release safety net.

risks.root_cause: Apify actor is placeholder `your-actor-id` and lacks robust result guarantees.
risks.recommended_fix: Integrate production actor IDs, implement retries/fallbacks, enforce min/max comp counts with expansion logic.
risks.launch_impact: Unreliable valuation inputs reduce report credibility.

risks.root_cause: `dvPercentOfRepair` is hardcoded to 0 and server-side validation is thin.
risks.recommended_fix: Compute all required valuation metrics from appraisal data and enforce minimum comp constraints + typed input validation.
risks.launch_impact: Incorrect outputs can undermine legal defensibility.

risks.root_cause: Role-based feature/API restrictions are largely unimplemented.
risks.recommended_fix: Add role policy layer and enforce in API handlers + UI capability guards.
risks.launch_impact: Paid/professional feature boundaries cannot be enforced.

risks.recommended_fix: Implement server actions/endpoints for each operation with ownership checks and audit logs.
risks.launch_impact: Operational UX and workflow throughput are reduced.

risks.root_cause: Required indexes (user_id/appraisal_id/status) are not explicitly declared.
risks.recommended_fix: Add index definitions and migration scripts; benchmark key query plans.

risks.root_cause: No centralized structured logging/error tracking integration.
risks.recommended_fix: Add request correlation IDs, structured logs, and error reporting hooks on all critical routes.
risks.launch_impact: Incident diagnosis and SLA management are weak.

risks.root_cause: Likely unused dependencies increase maintenance/security overhead.
risks.recommended_fix: Perform validated dep pruning with CI checks to avoid false positives.

risks.root_cause: No explicit performance budgets or bundle analysis artifacts.
risks.recommended_fix: Add Lighthouse/bundle analyzer workflows with thresholds and regressions alerts.
risks.launch_impact: Potentially slower UX on low-end devices.

risks.root_cause: No automated accessibility checks and limited explicit a11y patterns.
risks.recommended_fix: Add axe-based checks, keyboard nav tests, and WCAG conformance pass.
